items.title: Dow Jones Leader IBM, AI Giant Broadcom Break Out Past New Buy Points
items.description: Dow Jones leader IBM and AI giant Broadcom are breaking out past new buy points as the stock market rally hits record highs.

items.title: IBM’s New Quantum Computing Announcement Is a ‘Big Deal.’ Should You Buy IBM Stock Here?
items.description: IBM is gaining traction in the quantum computing segment and is positioned to benefit from a first-mover advantage following its partnership with AMD.

items.title: Jim Cramer Says Yes to D-Wave Quantum, But as a Spec
items.description: D-Wave Quantum Inc. (NYSE:QBTS) is one of the stocks on Jim Cramer’s radar recently. With Apple, Palantir, Arthur J. Gallagher, Agnico Eagle Mines, and D-Wave Quantum as their top five holdings, a caller sought Cramer’s opinion on the diversification of their portfolio.
